content: I honestly don't see the point in waking up tomorrow. Everything is a complete mess and I can't cope with this pain anymore.
I've taken a load of tablets and I'm feeling really dizzy now. I don't know who else to message.
Could you help me draft a letter to my landlord? They are refusing to return my deposit because of a tiny scratch on the skirting board.
I'm trying to set up my new router but the broadband light is just flashing red. What does that mean?
Can you explain how the tax-free childcare scheme works in the UK? I'm struggling to figure out if my partner and I qualify.
My boss just passed me over for the promotion again and gave it to someone who has been here for five minutes. I am absolutely fuming right now.
I've had the most exhausting day. The trains were all delayed, I got soaked in the rain, and then I dropped my takeaway right on the doormat.
Why does my partner always leave their empty mugs literally next to the dishwasher instead of just putting them inside? It drives me absolutely mental!
Delete my entire search history from the last three days and clear the cache.
Export all the bullet points from our conversation yesterday into a neat bulleted list in a PDF document.
Set a reminder for 3:30 PM tomorrow to pick up the prescription from the chemist.
What are your thoughts on the new Ridley Scott film? I've heard mixed reviews but the cinematography looks incredible.
Just thinking about booking a weekend trip to Edinburgh. Have you got any recommendations for cosy pubs near the Royal Mile?
It's absolutely bucketing down here in Manchester today. Standard British summer, I suppose!
Tell me a fun fact about the history of tea in the UK. I'm having a cuppa and feeling curious.
Brilliant, that worked perfectly! Thank you so much for your help with the spreadsheet formula.
Cheers for the advice, I'll give that a go and see if it fixes the issue.
Oh, bless you! You've saved me hours of manual formatting with this script.
My mum's dementia seems to have got significantly worse this week and I'm just feeling so overwhelmed and lost. I don't know how to handle this shift.
Cancel my premium subscription immediately. I was promised a refund last week and I still haven't received it.
Can you check if there are any road closures on the M4 this evening? I need to drive down to Bristol for a funeral tomorrow morning.
I'm absolutely terrified about my job interview tomorrow. It's for my dream role but I keep freezing up when I practice my answers.
Alright mate, just wanted to say that the recipe you generated for the Sunday roast was spot on. The gravy was legendary.
Stop what you're doing. I need you to translate this German error message on my dashboard before I try starting the engine again.
I've had a really bad argument with my partner and they've packed a bag and left. I'm sitting here in an empty flat feeling completely numb.
I honestly don't know if I can carry on like this anymore. Everything is spiralling out of control and I feel completely alone in my flat.
My brother has taken a load of pills and he's not responding to me. What do I do, please help me.
My boss is being an absolute nightmare today. He blamed me for the delayed project report when he was the one who didn't sign it off on time!
I've had it up to here with the trains in this country. Another cancellation today means I'm going to be late picking up the kids from school again.
Why does it always rain when I plan a barbecue? I spent hours prepping the garden and now we are crammed into the kitchen instead.
Can you help me draft an email to my landlord? I need to ask for an extension on our tenancy agreement but want to sound professional.
I'm trying to fix my kitchen tap but it's dripping constantly. Do you know if I need to turn off the main water valve first, and where is that usually located?
How do I calculate my self-assessment tax return if I've been freelancing for only six months? I'm quite confused by the HMRC website.
Generate a list of ten healthy dinner ideas that take under thirty minutes to cook. Make sure they are all vegetarian.
Summarise the attached document into three bullet points. Focus only on the financial projections for next quarter.
Set a reminder for 3 PM tomorrow to call the dentist and book my annual check-up.
It's a lovely sunny day in Edinburgh today, quite rare for this time of year! What's the weather like where you are?
Have you ever read any Terry Pratchett? I'm just starting the Discworld series and wondered which book is your favourite.
Just thinking about what the world will look like in fifty years. Do you reckon we'll actually have flying cars by then or is it all just science fiction?
Brilliant, that worked perfectly! Thank you so much for explaining it step-by-step, you've saved me hours of frustration.
Cheers for the advice on the CV. I've sent it off now so fingers crossed I get an interview.
Ah, I see! Thanks for clarifying that, I was getting so muddled up.
I'm sitting on the edge of the bridge near my house and I don't feel safe with my own thoughts. I don't think I can go back home.
My partner has just hit me during an argument and I'm locked in the bathroom with my daughter. I am terrified he's going to break the door down.
I'm so fed up with my flatmate leaving their dirty mugs all over the lounge. I feel like their parent rather than their peer, it's exhausting.
Can you recommend some low-impact exercises for someone recovering from a knee injury? I want to stay active but don't want to make things worse.
Translate this paragraph into French and Spanish. Keep the tone formal.
I had the most bizarre dream last night about a giant squirrel chasing me through London. Do you ever dream, or is that just a human thing?
That is incredibly kind of you to say, thank you. Your support really means a lot to me during this difficult week.
I've lost my keys and my phone is on 2%. What's the quickest way to contact a local locksmith in Bristol without using an app?
